GenAiPlannerBundle.description: AI agent that creates influencer maps by analyzing relationships and connections between accounts and contacts

genAiPlannerBundleInstructions.description: This agent specializes in creating influencer maps by analyzing account and contact relationships. It helps sales teams understand key decision makers, influence networks, and relationship dynamics to improve sales strategies and engagement approaches.

GenAiPlannerBundle.scope: Creates influencer maps for sales relationship analysis
